response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video (00:00-01:39). 2. Observed that the video is a single, continuous static promotional image of the VTuber Tsunomaki Watame. 3. Text overlays include 'watame', '2026.6.6', and 'Let's keep walking together toward our dreams!!'. 4. Listened to the audio, which is background instrumental music. 5. Concluded there is no vocal music. 6. Searched for the on-screen Japanese text to determine if it belongs to a known vocal song, but found it is a thematic promotional message, not a song title or lyrics. 7. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false.
response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring a static image of the VTuber Tsunomaki Watame, with text messages in Japanese and English, including '2026.6.6' and 'Let's keep walking together toward our dreams!!'. The background audio is instrumental.

scenes.description: A static promotional image of Tsunomaki Watame with text overlays. The background music is instrumental. No vocal music is present.
